hero.subtitle: A Layer-1 Built to Ship.
hero.summary: Nasun is a Move-based Layer-1 blockchain purpose-built for regulated economic coordination — spanning finance, AI compliance, and entertainment. South Korea has 16M+ crypto users, ~$70B in digital assets, and no Korean-native decentralized trading venue. The regulatory window is opening. We built first.

products.intro: Three live platforms power the ecosystem
products.pado: Full-featured DeFi — DEX, prediction markets, lottery, social trading. Live on devnet.
products.gensol: Cinematic sci-fi IP universe — multiplayer shooter, animation, film.
products.baram: On-chain AI compliance settlement layer with TEE-based execution and auditable economic records.

liveDevnet.title: Live Devnet
liveDevnet.desc: Full stack running — not a whitepaper

regulation.desc: Stablecoin law, RWA tokenization, AI Basic Act
